name: Eternal Prowl
short_description: 🔎 Solve a key puzzle to uncover the past. 🏚️ Explore a hauntingly abandoned house filled with mystery. ⏳ A short yet immersive horror experience – lasting up to 15 minutes, depending on your playstyle. 👁️ A perfect bite-sized horror adventure for those seeking a quick yet chilling escape.
detailed_description:
After many years, you return to your hometown, but nothing is as you remember it. The streets are empty, familiar places feel distant, and the past seems to have faded away. The old school bus is your only clue, leading you deeper into a mystery that begs to be solved.

Immerse yourself in an emotional journey filled with forgotten memories and unsettling discoveries. As you explore an abandoned house, you’ll uncover hidden secrets and solve a crucial puzzle that reveals the truth behind the town’s eerie transformation.

🔎 Solve a key puzzle to uncover the past.
🏚️ Explore a hauntingly abandoned house filled with mystery.
⏳ A short yet immersive horror experience – lasting up to 15 minutes, depending on your playstyle.
👁️ A perfect bite-sized horror adventure for those seeking a quick yet chilling escape.

Will you be able to unravel the truth, or will the past consume you?
